summary: Raw footage of CBP honor guards (Border Patrol, AMO, OFO) at the National Police Week Honor Guard competition: bagpipers, drill/rifle routines and marching before spectators. has_audio is false with no music track, no captions and no stylized editing, so it is a plain event/ceremony recording, not a youth-appeal produced spectacle. Out of scope: raw honor-guard competition footage, no audio/music, not produced.
